subcodes.first_line: O pure soul! Follow thou in the footsteps of the truthful and tread the way of the righteous, so that, through truthfulness, thou mayest come to occupy a Seat of Truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صادق موافق چه اسم مبارکی داری هر نفسی مظهر معنای این اسم باشد یعنی صادق
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
